scripts.quality: npm run manifest:test && npm run diagrams && npm run content && npm run content:verify && npm run visuals:verify && npm run diagrams:verify
scripts.build: npm run manifest:test && npm run diagrams && npm run content && npm run content:verify && npm run visuals:verify && npm run diagrams:verify && vitepress build docs
scripts.pdf: npm run manifest:test && npm run diagrams && npm run content && npm run content:verify && npm run visuals:verify && node scripts/generate-pdf.mjs && node scripts/verify-pdf-diagrams.mjs && npm run diagrams:verify
scripts.pdf:es: npm run translate:es:verify && BOOK_LANGUAGE=es node scripts/generate-pdf.mjs && npm run diagrams:verify
scripts.epub: npm run manifest:test && npm run diagrams && npm run content && npm run content:verify && npm run visuals:verify && node scripts/generate-epub.mjs && node scripts/verify-epub-diagrams.mjs
scripts.epub:es: npm run translate:es:verify && BOOK_LANGUAGE=es node scripts/generate-epub.mjs && npm run diagrams:verify
